sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91206" key="ptisth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πτισ-τής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, cj. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πτισάνης</foreign> (q.v.).</entryFree>
